name: Beacon Lighting Group Limited
analysis: BLX has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 53% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.7200, stop A$1.4256, target A$2.6155 (3.04:1) — then trail it.
